name: @radzor/image-resize
description: Resize, crop, and transform images using raw pixel manipulation. No external dependencies.

events.name: onProcessed
events.description: Fired when an image is processed

actions.name: resize
actions.description: Resize an image to specified dimensions

actions.name: crop
actions.description: Crop a region from an image

actions.name: thumbnail
actions.description: Generate a thumbnail with aspect ratio preservation

actions.name: getInfo
actions.description: Get image dimensions and format info
